title.raw: Google Business Profile Optimisation for Newcastle Restaurants
title.rendered: Google Business Profile Optimisation for Newcastle Restaurants

content.raw:
Google Business Profile Optimisation for Newcastle Restaurants

Your Google Business Profile is the first thing locals see when they search for restaurants near them. A complete, optimised profile drives more calls, more direction requests, and more dine-in and takeaway orders — without spending a dollar on ads.

Why GBP Matters for Newcastle Restaurants

  • Local pack visibility — appear in the top 3 map results for searches like "restaurants near me" or "best cafe Newcastle"
  • Direct bookings and calls — customers can call, get directions, or visit your website straight from the listing
  • Reviews build trust — a well-managed profile with recent reviews converts browsers into diners
  • Free traffic — unlike paid ads, GBP visibility costs nothing beyond the effort of keeping it updated

What We Set Up and Optimise

  • Business name, category, and description optimised for local search
  • Trading hours (including special hours for public holidays)
  • Menu link and ordering link (connected to your Square Online page)
  • High-quality photos — exterior, interior, food, and team
  • Review response strategy and templates
  • Posts and updates schedule
  • Q&A section with pre-populated common questions

Included With Your Square Setup

When you book our Newcastle Restaurant Square Setup, we include basic GBP optimisation as part of the go-live process — ensuring your online ordering link and contact details are consistent across Google and Square.

View the Full Square Setup Package
